name: Crunchy Potato Salad
recipeIngredient: 4 Green onions, including part of the green top -- sliced
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel and dice 4 medium potatoes into about 1/2-inch cubes to make approximately 5 cups.
2. Peel the cucumber (or leave on) and slice.
3. Combine the potato, cucumber, olives, green onion pieces, and apple in a large bowl.
4. Pour over the salad oil, lemon juice, and salt; mix gently with two forks until combined.
5. Add the salad dressing or mayonnaise and mix lightly until blended.
6. Taste and add more salt if needed.
7. Cover the bowl and chill for at least 30 minutes before serving. It keeps well up to about 6 hours.
8. To serve, turn into a bowl lined with salad greens.
9. For garnish, sprinkle additional sliced pimento-stuffed olives over the top.
